subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Tablet, sent down in truth for a people who comprehend, and therein lieth that which healeth the breasts of them that have believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات اللوح نزلت بالحق لقوم یفقهون و فیه ما یشفی به صدور الذین هم آمنوا
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
